name: Atom XVII
stageFocus: Pre-seed to Series A, emphasis on pre-Series A; ~₹3 Cr average ticket, 13-15 portfolio target
thesis: ₹75 Cr target Category II AIF by Harsh Kapadia for early-stage consumer businesses in emerging categories, with a focus beyond Tier-I cities; ₹40 Cr soft-committed (Safari Commercials anchor), first close targeted end-Jul 2026; warehoused ₹3 Cr bridge into Nothing Before Coffee.
